title: Navigating the Neurobiology of Migraine: From Pathways to Potential Therapies.
author_string: Tanaka, Masaru, Tuka, Bernadett, Vécsei, László
abstract: Migraine is a debilitating neurological disorder characterized by recurring episodes of throbbing headaches that are frequently accompanied by sensory disturbances, nausea, and sensitivity to light and sound [...].
